'''''Discril''-class attack cruisers''' were small [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] originally built for the defense fleet of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Daupherm/Legends|Daupherm]].

==History==
Built locally on [[Daupherm]], the ''Discril''-class was a mere corvette by [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] standards, they served as the main attack vessel of the [[Daupherm Marine Corps]] during the [[Daupherm-Boton Conflict]]. Their armament was adequate for skirmishes between low-tech fleets, but the [[Daupherm Planet States]] eventually realized they were falling behind the technology curve, and the ''Discril''-class was slowly phased out of service around the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

Many of these ships were stored away in reserve and others were scrapped, but some made their way into [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] at large. A few were legally sold on the used arms market, and at least one was stolen by its [[Captain/Legends|captain]]. They served especially well as [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] vessels.

The crime lord [[Rei'Kas]] had several ''Discril'' cruisers in the fleet that attacked [[Exocron]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].

==Behind the scenes==
The name of this ship's world of origin has been spelled as "Daupherm," "Duapherm," and possibly "Dawferm." "Daupherm" is the most numerous spelling, but "Duapherm" was used in the latest source.

{{Ship-stub}}
